description: The current stock balance for one item at one warehouse. stockOnHand is the physical quantity on hand; allocated is the quantity reserved against open requisitions or issues not yet physically moved; available is computed as stockOnHand minus allocated and is the quantity available for new demand. Updated in real time when a StockMovement is posted. The reorder worklist is derived from this entity by comparing available against Item.reorderPoint.

fields.name: id
fields.label: Inventory Record ID
fields.purpose: Stable surrogate key uniquely identifying one item-warehouse balance record, used as the FK target from StockMovement and referenced by the reorder worklist query.

fields.name: itemId
fields.label: Item
fields.validation: must reference an ONBOARDED Item; immutable after create; unique with warehouseCode
fields.purpose: Identifies which item this balance row covers; combined with warehouseCode forms the natural key so each item-warehouse pair has exactly one balance record.

fields.name: warehouseCode
fields.label: Warehouse
fields.validation: must reference an active Warehouse master; immutable after create; unique with itemId
fields.purpose: Identifies the storage location this balance covers; combined with itemId forms the natural key so multi-site or multi-warehouse operations each have their own balance row per item.

fields.name: stockOnHand
fields.label: Stock on Hand
fields.validation: >= 0; in Item.stockUom; incremented by RECEIPT movements (from GRN), decremented by ISSUE and TRANSFER movements (from consumption or transfer)
fields.purpose: The actual physical quantity currently in the warehouse for this item; the primary stock figure the reorder worklist and available computation use (axiom A21).

fields.name: allocated
fields.label: Allocated (Reserved)
fields.validation: >= 0; <= stockOnHand; in Item.stockUom; quantity reserved against open demand not yet physically issued
fields.purpose: Prevents over-promising stock by recording quantity that is committed to open demand; reduces the available figure so new demand orders only against truly free stock.

fields.name: available
fields.label: Available Quantity
fields.validation: >= 0; computed; never stored independently of stockOnHand and allocated
fields.purpose: The quantity free to satisfy new demand and the operand in the reorder check (axiom A21: available <= reorderPoint triggers the worklist entry; suggestedQty = maxStock - available).

fields.name: lastMovementAt
fields.label: Last Movement At
fields.validation: set to now() by the platform on each StockMovement post; null until first movement
fields.purpose: Timestamps the most recent stock movement for this item-warehouse balance; used for slow-mover reporting and to determine staleness of a balance record.

invariants: A21 available (stockOnHand - allocated) at or below Item.reorderPoint surfaces this item on the reorder worklist; suggestedQty = Item.maxStock - available
A13 every StockMovement that changes stockOnHand is audited and broadcast via SSE
unique natural key: (itemId, warehouseCode); only one balance row per item-warehouse pair
